title: Landscapes Reimagined Dark Mode
description: A pack for Landscapes Reimagined adding dark mode GUIs
body:
## What is this pack?

This pack is built for [Landscapes Reimagined Genisis](https://modrinth.com/modpack/landscapes-reimagined-genesis) and adds dark mode versions for all in game GUIs*. It also changes text to be white to make viewing easier. Vanilla GUIs and white text is taken from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) who were the basis for this idea and the color scheming for all other GUIs

###### * If you find a missing GUI, please let me know!


---

This replaces all vanilla GUIs...
![](https://i.imgur.com/fwKP80t.png)

As well as all modded GUIs!
![](https://i.imgur.com/LZqFjC9.png)


### Want to setup a server using our official server host, click the banner below!
